name: perf budget: rule exceeding meta.budget.ms_per_kloc warns to stderr with measured value
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule slow-rule --in "$PWD/file.js" --enforce-budget 2>out.txt && grep -E 'slow-rule.*budget exceeded' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "const x${i}=${i};" >> file.js; done
